results.rendered_html:
āśva (von aśva)
1〉 adj. dem Pferde zugehörig, von ihm herrührend u. s. w.: āśvaṃ rūpaṃ (Pferdegestalt) kṛtvā  NIR. 12,10 . mūtra  SUŚR. 1,194,2 . von Pferden gezogen: rathaḥ  P. 4,2,92 , Sch. vahanīyam 4,3,120, Vārtt. 2 , Sch. 4,3,123 , Sch.
— 2〉 n.
a〉 ein Trupp Pferde  P. 4,2,48 .  AK. 2,8,2,16 .  H. 1420 .
— b〉 āśva = aśvasya bhāvo karma vā  P. 5,1,129 , Sch.

results.rendered_html:
āśva a. (śvī f.) [aśvasyedaṃ aṇ]
1 Belonging to or coming from a horse, equestrian; āśvaṃ kaphaharaṃ mūtraṃ kṛmidadruṣu śasyate  Suśr. 
2 Drawn by horses (as a chariot).
— śvaṃ
1 A number of horses.
2 A chariot drawn by horses.
3 The state or action of a horse (aśvasya bhāvaḥ karma vā  Sk. ).
